chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 4551 of 2025 [M/s. Karachi Aero Club G. Limited v. The Member, LU, BOR & others] Petitioner: M/s. Karachi Aero Club G Limited, through Mr. Usman Tufail Sheikh Advocate. Date of hearing: 18-12-2025 Date of decision: 18-12-2025 O R D E R Muhammad Jaffer Raza J. – Through the instant petition, the Petitioner has impugned orders dated 22.07.2025 and 24.06.2020 passed by the Respondent No.1 [The Member (Land Utilization) Board of Revenue Sindh Karachi. Perusal of the impugned orders reveals that the same pertain to restoration of blocked entries purportedly belonging to the Petitioner. It is evident from the perusal of the impugned orders that the same involve disputed questions of fact which cannot be agitated before this Court in its writ jurisdiction. In the light of the same the instant petition along with listed applications is dismissed in limine with the observation that the Petitioner is at liberty to approach the Courts of competent jurisdiction for redressal of its grievance. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi P.A.
